default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategy for launching RoomBlocks, a new consumer-focused group travel booking site by Engine.](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [RoomBlocks aims to capture B2C group travel market (weddings, sports teams, etc.) separate from Engine's B2B focus](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Current growth is primarily paid traffic; goal is to build organic search presence for new domain](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai proposed a strategy sprint to scope out content approach, blending editorial and programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### RoomBlocks Context and Goals

  - [Separate from Engine.com to target consumer group travel (weddings, sports teams, church groups)](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Currently relies on paid traffic; aims to build organic search presence](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Strong conversion rates on existing landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Need to avoid conflict with hotel partnerships (can't list specific hotels)](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

### Content Strategy Ideas

  - [Start with wedding-focused content, scalable to other industries](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Blend of informational content, tools (e.g., calculators, checklists), and hotel listings](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Potential for custom recommendation engines based on event descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Leverage existing partnerships and data (e.g., hotels with meeting spaces, pricing info)](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Technical Approach

  - [New domain: "RoomBlocks by Engine" or "powered by Engine"](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Marketing pages as entry point, leading to product team-owned booking pages](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai can potentially build initial MVP experience](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### Strategy Sprint Proposal

  - [4-8 week engagement to scope out and prove content approach](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [Blend of editorial and programmatic content, focusing on quality signals](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Opportunity to build case for internal buy-in at Engine](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX.ai to regroup internally and propose kickoff timing (within 1-2 days)](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Engine team to share any additional context or existing plans](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up deep dive meeting once timing is confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/XzJez2m5tk7z5hYAaDq1QXwPKkpdACMD?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)

action_items.description: Regroup internally (1-2 days) re. availability for RoomBlocks strategy sprint; follow up w/ Joel & Cole
Prepare & share any additional thoughts/plans for RoomBlocks project ahead of strategy sprint
Compile & share any additional insights/plans for RoomBlocks project before strategy sprint kickoff
